# Stackers Mania - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
A full-stack modern business website for Stackers Mania - a web design and development company featuring a React/Vite frontend and Node.js/Express backend.

## Frontend (React + Vite)
- Modern landing page with smooth animations
- Sections: Home, Services, Work, About, Careers, Contact
- Responsive design for all devices
- Premium dark theme with purple/green accents
- Color Palette:
  - Primary Purple: #7F77DD
  - Primary Green: #1D9E75
  - Secondary Lavender: #A79AF5
  - Accent Mint: #2DDBA0
  - Highlight Orange: #EF9F27

## Backend (Node.js + Express)
- API routes for form submissions
- Email handling with environment configuration
- CORS and validation support

## Setup Instructions
1. Install dependencies: `npm install` in root
2. Start frontend dev server: `npm run dev` in client folder
3. Start backend server: `npm start` in server folder
4. Frontend runs on http://localhost:5173
5. Backend runs on http://localhost:5000

## Services Offered
- Web Design
- Web Development
- E-Commerce Solutions
- Mobile-First Design
- SEO Optimization
- Maintenance & Support
